service.description: Get the backend url (list) for a given applicationId and version. Also returns force update information when app version is below minimum required version.

log.message: Incoming version is greater than DB version: using override URL: $backendUrl from database
Version equals DB version and request from test system (origin: $originHeader): using override URL: $backendUrl
Version equals DB version and request from production (origin: $originHeader): using production URL

set.value: Press Ctrl+F5 to refresh and get the new version

log.message: Force update required for $applicationId: app version $version is below minimum $versionDb

set.from: [ applicationId: app.applicationId.substring(3), version: app.version, backendUrl: app.backendUrl, assessmentId: app.assessmentId]

service.description: Get the backend url (list) for a given applicationId and version

log.message: Could not find backend url for ${application.applicationId}

service.description: Get the backend url (list) for a given applicationId and version

log.message: No userPartyId provided and not logged in, cannot get user related company and owner

return.message: Not logged in and provided userPartyId: $userPartyId not found

service.description: get statistics

set.from: [ admins: st.admins, employees: st.employees, suppliers: st.suppliers, leads: st.leads, customers: st.customers, openSlsOrders: st.openSlsOrders, openPurOrders: st.openPurOrders, opportunities: st.opportunities, myOpportunities: myOpportunities, categories: st.categories, products: st.products, assets: st.assets, salesInvoicesNotPaidCount: st.salesInvoicesNotPaidCount, salesInvoicesNotPaidAmount: st.salesInvoicesNotPaidAmount?.toString(), purchInvoicesNotPaidCount: st.purchInvoicesNotPaidCount, purchInvoicesNotPaidAmount: st.purchInvoicesNotPaidAmount?.toString(), allTasks: st.allTasks, notInvoicedHours: st.notInvoicedHours, outgoingShipments: st.outgoingShipments, incomingShipments: st.incomingShipments, whLocations: st.whLocations, requests: st.requests, ]

[ admins: 0, employees: 0, suppliers: 0, leads: 0, customers: 0, openSlsOrders: 0, openPurOrders: 0, opportunities: 0, myOpportunities: 0, categories: 0, products: 0, assets: 0, salesInvoicesNotPaidCount: 0, salesInvoicesNotPaidAmount: '0.00', purchInvoicesNotPaidCount: 0, purchInvoicesNotPaidAmount: '0.00', allTasks: 0, notInvoicedHours: 0, outgoingShipments: 0, incomingShipments: 0, whLocations: 0, requests: 0, notReadChatRooms: chatRooms ]

service.description: Job run by the job sheduler or at owner creation, do not make pubic.

service-call.name: store#growerp.general.Statistics
service-call.in-map: [ ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, admins: admins, employees: employees, suppliers: suppliers, leads: leads, customers: customers, openSlsOrders: openSlsOrders, openPurOrders: openPurOrders, opportunities: opportunities, categories: categories, products: products, assets: assets, salesInvoicesNotPaidCount: allRecInvList ? allRecInvList[0].invoiceCount : '0', salesInvoicesNotPaidAmount: allRecInvList ? allRecInvList[0].unpaidTotal : '0.00', purchInvoicesNotPaidCount: allPblInvList ? allPblInvList[0].invoiceCount : '0', purchInvoicesNotPaidAmount: allPblInvList ? allPblInvList[0].unpaidTotal : '0.00', allTasks: allTasks, notInvoicedHours: notInvoicedHours, incomingShipments: incomingShipments, outgoingShipments: outgoingShipments, whLocations: whLocations, requests: requests, ]

service.description: This service will return "ok" when the system is running, no login required
Get userlogin information when a proper Apikey is provided in the header

parameter.name: classificationId
parameter.description: Deprecated alias for applicationId, kept for old clients

parameter.name: vatPerc
parameter.description: Percentage used for VAT if applicable

service.description: Get units of measure list for registration.

parameter.name: uomTypes
parameter.description: UOM type, e.g. UT_CURRENCY_MEASURE, UT_TIME_FREQ_MEASURE, UT_WEIGHT_MEASURE, UT_VOLUME_MEASURE, UT_LENGTH_MEASURE OTH_ea: each

iterate.script: uoms.add([ uomId: uom.uomId, uomTypeId: uom.uomTypeEnumId, typeDescription: uom.typeDescription, abbreviation: uom.abbreviation, description: uom.description, ])

service.description: Convert an amount between currencies. Uses a cached rate from moqui.basic.UomConversion when less than 24 hours old, otherwise fetches a live rate via the Stripe Exchange Rate API and caches it as a new UomConversion record. Falls back to the newest cached rate when no live rate is available; when no rate exists at all returns the amount unconverted with converted=false.

service-call.name: Stripe.StripePaymentServices.convert#Currency
service-call.in-map: [secretKey: stripeGatewayInfoMap.secretKey, amount: amount, fromCurrencyUomId: fromCurrencyUomId, toCurrencyUomId: toCurrencyUomId]

service-call.name: create#moqui.basic.UomConversion
service-call.in-map: [uomId: fromCurrencyUomId, toUomId: toCurrencyUomId, conversionFactor: exchangeRate, fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service-call.name: create#moqui.basic.UomConversion
service-call.in-map: [uomId: fromCurrencyUomId, toUomId: toCurrencyUomId, conversionFactor: exchangeRate, fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

log.message: Using stale cached currency rate ${fromCurrencyUomId} to ${toCurrencyUomId} from ${rateRow.fromDate}
No exchange rate available from ${fromCurrencyUomId} to ${toCurrencyUomId}, returning unconverted amount

service.description: Get country list for registration.
logout of the system

Authenticate user and determine next action based on tenant setup status and subscription. Returns apiKey to indicate what the frontend should do next: - 'authenticated': Normal login, user can proceed - 'setupRequired': Admin needs to provide company name/currency - 'subscriptionExpired': Subscription expired, payment required - 'passwordChange': User must change password

parameter.name: classificationId
parameter.description: Deprecated alias for applicationId, kept for old clients

parameter.name: plan
parameter.description: productId of the GROWERP subscription plan

set.from: [ user: [loginName: username], applicationId: applicationId, classificationId: applicationId, loginStatus: 'passwordChange', apiKey: 'passwordChange' ]

service-call.name: growerp.100.TenantServices100.complete#TenantSetup
service-call.in-map: [ ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, companyPartyId: companyPartyId, companyName: companyName, currencyId: currencyId, demoData: demoData, applicationId: applicationId, userPartyId: userAccount.partyId, hostName: ec.web?.getHostName(false), timeZoneOffset: timeZoneOffset ]

set.from: [ ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, applicationId: applicationId, classificationId: applicationId, loginStatus: 'setupRequired', apiKey: 'setupRequired', user: [ partyId: userAccount.partyId, firstName: person.firstName, lastName: person.lastName, loginName: username, email: username, userGroupId: 'GROWERP_M_ADMIN' ], company: [partyId: companyPartyId], moquiSessionToken: password ]

return.message: Tenant setup not complete. Please contact administrator.

log.message: Login subscription check: ownerPartyId=${ownerPartyId}, checking if != 'GROWERP'

service-call.name: growerp.100.TenantServices100.renew#TenantSubscription
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, plan: plan, creditCardNumber: creditCardNumber, creditCardType: creditCardType, nameOnCard: nameOnCard, expireMonth: expireMonth, expireYear: expireYear, cVC: cVC]

set.from: [ ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, applicationId: applicationId, classificationId: applicationId, loginStatus: 'subscriptionExpired', apiKey: 'subscriptionExpired', evaluationDays: evaluationDays, user: [ partyId: userAccount.partyId, firstName: person.firstName, lastName: person.lastName, loginName: username, email: username ], company: [ partyId: companyPartyId, name: mainCompanies[0].companyName ], moquiSessionToken: password ]

log.message: User ${ec.user.username} already logged in but trying to login as ${username}, logging out first

service.description: will send a new password by email and will initiate a change password at login time

log.message: Email server not configured: reset password for user ${userAccount.username} is ${resetPassword}

return.message: Could not find a user account for $username

service.description: Change the password of an account and re-enable also used with reset password logged off

parameter.name: classificationId
parameter.description: Deprecated alias for applicationId, kept for old clients

parameter.name: vatPerc
parameter.description: Percentage used for VAT if applicable

service-call.name: org.moqui.impl.UserServices.update#Password
service-call.in-map: [username: username, oldPassword: oldPassword, newPassword: newPassword, newPasswordVerify: newPassword]

service.description: Returns the plaintext temp reset password for a user. Only works when email server is not configured (dev/test environments). Used by integration tests to complete the forgot-password flow.

return.message: Not available when email server is configured

service.description: Get REST request data from OwnerPersonRestRequest entity and convert to RestRequest model format

set.from: [ user: [ partyId: restData.userPartyId, firstName: restData.firstName, lastName: restData.lastName, email: restData.emailAddress, loginName: restData.loginName ], companyName: restData.companyName, dateTime: restData.startDateTime ? ec.l10n.format(restData.startDateTime,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssZ') : null, restRequestName: restData.artifactName ? restData.artifactName.substring(restData.artifactName.lastIndexOf('.') + 1) : null, serverIp: restData.serverIpAddress, serverHostName: restData.serverHostName, parameterString: restData.parameterString, wasError: restData.wasError == 'Y', errorMessage: restData.errorMessage, requestUrl: restData.requestUrl, referrerUrl: restData.referrerUrl, isSlowHit: restData.isSlowHit == 'Y', runningTimeMillis: restData.runningTimeMillis?.intValue() ]

service.description: Call Gemini AI API with a prompt and optional configuration

parameter.name: prompt
parameter.description: The text prompt to send to Gemini

parameter.name: options
parameter.description: Optional config: model, temperature, topK, topP, maxOutputTokens, jsonMode

actions.script: def GeminiAiUtil = _scriptResult def opts = options ?: [:] if (!opts.ownerPartyId) opts.ownerPartyId = relInfo.ownerPartyId generatedText = GeminiAiUtil.callGeminiApi(ec, prompt, opts)

service.description: Generate a platform-optimized message from a campaign template using AI

actions.script: def GeminiAiUtil = _scriptResult platformMessage = GeminiAiUtil.generatePlatformMessage(ec, campaignTemplate, platform, actionType, relInfo.ownerPartyId)

service.description: Get a list of email templates, optionally filtered by search string

iterate.script: def bodyContent = null def dbLocation = "dbresource://growerp/email/${t.emailTemplateId}.html" try { bodyContent = ec.resource.getLocationText(dbLocation, false) } catch (Exception e) {} emailTemplates.add([ emailTemplateId: t.emailTemplateId, description: t.description, emailTypeEnumId: t.emailTypeEnumId, fromAddress: t.fromAddress, fromName: t.fromName, subject: t.subject, bodyScreenLocation: t.bodyScreenLocation, bodyContent: bodyContent, replyToAddresses: t.replyToAddresses, ccAddresses: t.ccAddresses, bccAddresses: t.bccAddresses ])

service.description: Create or update an email template. If bodyContent is provided it is stored in dbresource://growerp/email/{emailTemplateId}.html and bodyScreenLocation is updated accordingly.

actions.script: def bodyContent = null try { bodyContent = ec.resource.getLocationText(dbLocation, false) } catch (Exception e) {}

set.from: [ emailTemplateId: result.emailTemplateId, description: result.description, emailTypeEnumId: result.emailTypeEnumId, fromAddress: result.fromAddress, fromName: result.fromName, subject: result.subject, bodyScreenLocation: result.bodyScreenLocation, bodyContent: bodyContent, replyToAddresses: result.replyToAddresses, ccAddresses: result.ccAddresses, bccAddresses: result.bccAddresses ]

service.description: Delete an email template by id
Return the SystemSettings record for the current tenant. mailPassword is masked as "****" when set.

actions.script: systemSettings.mailPassword = ss.mailPassword ? '****' : ''; systemSettings.githubToken = ss.githubToken ? '****' : ''; systemSettings.githubRepository = ss.githubRepository ?: ''; systemSettings.llmSystemTokenLimit = ss.llmSystemTokenLimit; systemSettings.googleClientSecret = ss.googleClientSecret ? '****' : ''; systemSettings.googleRefreshToken = ss.googleRefreshToken ? '****' : ''

service.description: Create or update SystemSettings for the current tenant. Also syncs SMTP/store fields into moqui.basic.email.EmailServer so built-in Moqui email services keep working. mailPassword is not updated when blank or "****".

return.message: ownerPartyId not found for current user

if.script: try { ec.service.sync().name('AdkServices100.reload#Adk').call() } catch (Throwable t) { ec.logger.warn("ADK reload skipped: ${t.message}") }

service.description: One-time idempotent migration: copies geminiApiKey from SystemSettings rows into LlmConfig(llmProvider='gemini') and clears the flat field.
